overview: Ageless Life offers customized pain management treatments including regenerative medicine, spine and joint injections, and ketamine infusion therapy. The practice operates on a self-pay model without insurance.
highlights: Dr. Kloster is the only physician in Kansas City performing regenerative lumbar procedures
Ketamine infusion therapy for chronic pain and depression
targetAudience: Patients with chronic pain or treatment-resistant depression seeking alternatives to insurance-dependent care.
